5. 
Aggrieved by the aforesaid orders dated 15.02.2022 and 16.09.2022, 
appellant has preferred the related appeals. By order dated 02.11.2022, 
permission to file appeal was granted and delay was condoned. 
306 
Supreme Court Reports
Thereafter, notice was issued. This Court also passed an interim 
order staying the operation of the impugned orders dated 15.02.2022 
and 16.09.2022 so far as imposing compensation on the appellant.
6. 
Learned senior counsel for the appellant submits that the impugned 
orders dated 15.02.2022 and 16.09.2022 are non est in the eye 
of law in as much as those orders were passed by the NGT in 
complete violation of the principles of natural justice. Though the 
entire allegations in O.A. No. 71/2021 were directed against the 
appellant and though the impugned orders have adversely affected
